characters.description: A powerful protector whose injured soul and unusual inner world carry lasting consequences from earlier conflicts. His mind is home to autonomous allies, and his choices are shaped by a broad commitment to keep his companions and world safe.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: Ruwen's partner and trusted healer, whose unusual magic reaches abstract forces as well as ordinary wounds. She is part of his closest circle and remains one of the people whose safety and future most strongly guide his decisions.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: A trusted fighter and Lylan's partner who travels with an elder star tortoise. His martial skill and loyalty make him a dependable member of Ruwen's group.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: A dangerous and capable scout allied with Ruwen and partnered with Sift. Her unusual blood and magic distinguish her even within the group, while unanswered questions about her legacy remain part of her personal path.
characters.name: Lylan

characters.description: Ruwen's soulbound adviser and close mental companion. She is beginning to develop the ability to travel through the void.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: An unusual realm-crossing ally associated with the Black Pyramid. Blapy possesses deep knowledge, formidable resources, and a long-standing place among Ruwen's trusted companions, often helping with threats that cross ordinary boundaries.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: An autonomous planner who lives within Ruwen's inner world and shares much of his intellect and drive to improve. Overlord is a distinct person and ally who contributes analysis, organization, and combat support.
characters.name: Overlord

characters.description: One of the autonomous people living within Ruwen's inner world. This companion has an identity separate from Ruwen and remains part of his continuing circle of mental allies.
characters.name: the inner-world companion

characters.description: An autonomous narrator who lives within Ruwen's inner world. This companion is a distinct person and a continuing member of the group of allies sharing Ruwen's mind.
characters.name: the inner-world narrator

characters.description: An independently minded intelligence who advises Ruwen on civic, defensive, and system-level problems. Lir combines broad administrative responsibility with exacting analysis and continues to help manage Grave's security and development.
characters.name: Lir

characters.description: A sentient weapon allied with Sift and carrying knowledge that spans the connected realms. Its advice is valuable to Ruwen's group, but its origins, outward presentation, and larger agenda are not yet fully understood.
characters.name: the elder dagger

characters.description: A powerful enemy whose actions threaten Ruwen's companions and the wider realms. He enters this volume as a continuing adversary, with ambitions and resources that make him a major force in the conflict.
characters.name: the Infernal Lord

characters.description: A hostile internal entity associated with the Infernal Lord. Nameless is dangerous not only for its destructive nature, but for its ability to exist within and act through a person's mind, where ordinary physical defenses offer little protection.
characters.name: Nameless

characters.description: Ruwen Starfield in a new four-winged seraph body made from destruction essence. Creation power preserved his consciousness during the conversion, but he has lost access to spirit and Harmony and does not yet know how to recover his human form.
characters.name: Ruin

characters.description: An autonomous destruction authority integrated with Ruin's armor and new form. It originated from the ruler of the five-tower island and has resisted his attempts to leave, making its motives and degree of independence immediate concerns.
characters.name: the Scarecrow aspect

characters.description: A powerful gray stranger who crosses the void to kill Ruin. His arrival makes him appear to be an assassin targeting the new Destruction Emperor.
characters.name: the void-traveling stranger

characters.description: Blapy's vast black worm form, summoned when a powerful stranger arrives to kill Ruin. Miranda recognizes the intruder and confronts him.
characters.name: Miranda

characters.description: An Abyssal Lord and Riftweaver who can bridge the void between universes. He treats Miranda and Rami as family, recognizes Ruin's new existence as an alarming impossibility, and warns that manipulating fate can cause catastrophic consequences.
characters.name: Rami's father

characters.description: Ruin's bound mount, summoned to retrieve allies after Rami leaves for void training.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: Rami's boyfriend and one of the allies Ruin plans to bring into the Destruction Realm under the protection of a Voidguard ring. His place in the group links him to both Rami's future and Ruin's preparations.
characters.name: Xavier

characters.description: A previously unseen translucent seraph woman who appears inside the sealed royal vault and interrupts Ruin before he inserts a heritage gem.
characters.name: the unknown translucent seraph

characters.description: A translucent seraph consciousness preserved in Ruin's authority band and in fragments associated with the Scarecrow aspect. She once tried to take his body, but now needs him alive and offers royal and Outerverse knowledge under a conditional agreement.
characters.name: the former royal survivor

characters.description: A Shadowmancer Sentinel who guards the Destruction Realm boundary. Confronted with Ruin's Emperor class, the warden submits to him as a royal heir and offers guidance through the towers as a chance to atone for earlier inaction.
characters.name: the Dark Tower warden

characters.description: Golden guardians within the Grove of Four who are revealed as conscious echoes of Ruwen's fallen classmates rather than inert oath constructs.
characters.name: the golden grove echoes

characters.description: Conscious echoes of Ruwen's fallen classmates who endure within the Grove of Four. After learning that their people survived, they choose to help him establish and maintain the Outer Mind across the battlefield.
characters.name: the twenty-nine golden guardians

characters.description: A ruler from the Creation Realm who is bound to an object carried by Sift. He possesses knowledge about the towers that Ruwen needs for his investigation.
characters.name: the Creation-realm ruler

characters.description: Commander of Grave's rapid-response defenders and an order judge who challenges Ruwen's unfamiliar seraph form under Third Temple authority.
characters.name: Cirilla Minsul

characters.description: An outside-universe enemy believed to be trapped nearby and capable of killing Ruwen rather than risk recruiting him.
characters.name: the zealot

characters.description: The bearer of Death's aspect, which remains with her after the other tower aspects return to their sources. Her blood oath connects her fate to the Death Tower and to Ruwen's dealings with its personification.
characters.name: Echo

characters.description: The personification of Death and one of the Twelve, rather than an ordinary seraph. The avatar offers Ruwen a protected crypt and energy pool where his companions can undergo dangerous refinement and fortification work.
characters.name: the Death Tower avatar
